data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: YouTube employs a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed services using REST APIs, managed with Kubernetes.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Utilizes CDN to efficiently deliver video content to a global audience.
data.technical_spec: Global distributed network with edge caching.

data.title: Redundant Distributed Databases
data.description: Ensures data redundancy and high availability with distributed databases.
data.technical_spec: Combination of SQL and NoSQL databases across data centers.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Implements load balancing to manage traffic and ensure even distribution of requests.
data.technical_spec: Advanced load balancing algorithms using Google Cloud's infrastructure.

data.title: Scalable Storage Systems
data.description: Custom-built storage systems to handle large amounts of video data.
data.technical_spec: Combination of distributed file systems and object storage solutions.
